name: Memory Editor
description: Live memory scanner. Scan, freeze, and write game memory values. Export RetroArch .cht files via browser on your local network.
author: Aaron Earles

changelog.v0.1.1: Fix WebSocket connection (was always Disconnected). Add permission error diagnostic for scan.
changelog.v0.1.2: Fix daemon crash on first scan. Scan now runs in background — UI shows Scanning… then updates when done. WS stays connected throughout.
changelog.v0.1.3: Fix scan UX: Refine becomes primary button after first scan, workflow hint added, before/after count shown on refine. Add Cache-Control: no-store to prevent stale UI.
